production.notes: win_prob_soften + win_prob_abs_cap tame tail probs (see sidebar). Retrain after changing training floors.

training.win_marginal_lambda_floor_note: Minimum λ toward training home-win rate after isotonic+temperature. Set 0.0 for val-only λ.
training.win_temperature_floor_note: Minimum logit temperature T (≥1). Softens probs when val-optimal T would be 1. Set 1.0 to disable.
